content.en:
Somewhere in the Killing God Realm.

Ye Tian was fighting with a group of creatures, he was full of terrifying killing aura, every move and style did not deliberately pursue time and space control skills, but it contained many changes in the way of killing, as if the many changes in the way of killing were completely applied to every move and every style.

These killing moves are not considered space-time control techniques, but they give full play to the way of killing, killing more creatures at the minimum cost, and showing extremely terrifying killing ability.

In the endless killing, his will was sharpened to be extremely tenacious, as if he had tempered his will hundreds of millions of times, and his will did not seem to improve much, but in fact, the essence had improved, and he was getting closer and closer to the peak will of the ninth order.

Finally this day.

In the battle with countless creatures, Ye Tian finally completed the final tempering of his will.

Rumble!!!!

The will of the late ninth order finally broke the shackles and was promoted to the peak will of the ninth order.

At this moment, Ye Tian's perception of the outer world seemed to have reached a level above time and space, and he could even sense the changes of various Dao in the void, which he couldn't perceive before.

At this moment, he could perceive the many changes in the way of killing in the God Killing Realm, and the changes in the killing aura when each creature made a move, so as to know the future traces and power of each creature's shot, and know how to avoid it.

Puff puff!!!

Ye Tian held the Killing Spear in his hand, and easily killed one killing creature after another, almost using little strength, and really did a good job of killing creatures with almost zero consumption.

In other words, the cost of killing creatures is almost the same as the recovery rate.

Therefore, he can fight forever, and this endless killing creature can't help him.

There is no need for this kind of strength to stay in the God Killing Realm, there is no sharpening value for him here.

"The peak of the ninth order, compared to the late stage of the ninth order, it is much stronger!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He clearly felt that his strength had crossed a level, but it was still a little short of the Six Realms level master.

"I didn't expect that my will had risen to the peak of the ninth order, and my strength still hadn't stepped into the realm of the sixth realm master. It is rumored that if you want to become a Seven Realms-level master, you must create a top-notch origin control technique, and it seems that this is indeed the case. "

Ye Tian muttered.

"It's time to go!"

Ye Tian left the God Killing Realm and returned to the outside world.

The soul will returned to its true body, and there was a moment of discomfort, but it soon completely controlled the soul will.

After all, as a Five Realms-level controller, he still has this ability.

Subsequently, according to the connection between this true body and the body, Ye Tian went to the direction of the boundary river.

Constantly shuttling and shuttling, Ye Tian finally returned to the Third Realm River after spending a long time.

Of course.

He could also choose to destroy this true body, but now that the price of condensing a true body is not low, he will not do so.

After returning, Ye Tian returned to the Cave Heaven Blessed Land that was suspected to be the Black Ancestor, and comprehended the statue of Ten Thousand Phases.

This time.

Ye Tian found that the effect of contemplating the Ten Thousand Phases Statue was much better, and the speed of contemplation was faster than before.

"It should be that after my will has been raised to the peak of the ninth order, it will be easier to comprehend the changes in the Dao. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the changes in the way of defense, the way of fire, and the way of thunder, and strive to master the changes of these ways to ten million changes.

At that time, he can perfect several of his Origin Control Techniques, making these Origin Control Skills more powerful, which will also help improve his strength.

Before you know it, three million years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already mastered more than 10 million changes in the way of defense, the way of fire, and the way of thunder, and the accumulation was enough, so he began to perfect the origin control techniques of the flame explosion, air shock, heavenly body, and thunder body nine flashes.

It took a long time, and the power of these Origin Control Techniques finally increased a lot, reaching the level of a powerful Origin Control Technique.

However, Ye Tian's strength still did not reach the combat power of the Six Realms level controllers, and it seemed that he still lacked a transformation point.

"Unless I raise my body of control from level eight to the peak of level eighth, or create an origin control technique that is very close to the top origin control technique!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

And if you want to create that kind of origin control technique, you must at least master tens of millions of variations of a Dao.

It's still a huge challenge for him, but at least it's promising.

this day.

Ye Tian gathered another key in Tuta and exchanged it for a Water Boundary River Monument.

Of course, Ye Tian is no longer exchanging the Boundary River Monument for himself, but for the sake of the Terran Race, he has put all his Boundary River Monuments in the Terran territory in the Void Region, so that the geniuses of the Terran can participate in cultivation and improve the strength of the Terran Race.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to participate in enlightenment, and he didn't care much about many things.

His only goal now was to master the changes of fifty million spatial paths, and as for how many years it would take, he didn't know.

If you can't do it in 10 million river years, that's 50 million river years, and if you can't do it in 50 million river years, that's 100 million river years.

One day, he will be able to comprehend 50 million changes in the Dao of Space, and then he will be able to create an Origin Control Technique second only to the top Origin Control Technique.

A long time passed, and before he knew it, Ye Tian had already comprehended the statue of Ten Thousand Phases for sixty million years.

Such a long period of penance retreat can be said to be Ye Tian's longest time.

And on this day, Ye Tian finally mastered the changes in the Dao of Space to 50 million kinds.

The changes of the 50 million spatial paths, Ye Tian did not dare to imagine before, if there were no statues of ten thousand phases, Ye Tian would not have mastered the changes of the 50 million spatial paths so quickly.

"Almost, you can go and create a more powerful Origin Mastery Technique. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the years that followed, he did his best to create an incomparably terrifying Origin Control Technique, and this step took him more than a million realms of river years.

And on this day, he finally succeeded.

In a cultivation time and space in the blessed land of the Cave Heaven, Ye Tian practiced the origin control technique he had created here.

I saw Ye Tian lightly, and the time and space along the way shattered and annihilated, it was a complete annihilation, the kind that was almost difficult to recover, and a blow penetrated through hundreds of millions of time and space, and the power was terrifying to the extreme.

"Many, much more powerful than the air quake!"

After Ye Tian created this move, he knew that his strength had broken the shackles and reached the level of a Six Realm-level controller.

This strength is also a high-level combat power if you look at the entire Origin Realm Sea.

"This trick is called shattering the sky!"

Ye Tian took the name.
